signatureMove.name: Stand & Deliver
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was not slain, and the enemy is in possession of a Moonstone, then they must choose: Suffer 3 Wds or lose possession of one Moonstone and this character gains possession of that Moonstone.

abilities.name: Sure Footed
abilities.description: This character may Jog over Water Features and Wooded Patches and pays 1 less energy for Traverse actions.

abilities.name: Brace of Pistols
abilities.description: This character may use the [Reload] ability without paying the energy cost.

abilities.name: Robbery
abilities.description: Target model with less Wds remaining than this character loses possession of one Moonstone and this character gains possession of that Moonstone.

abilities.name: Reload [Shoot Pistol]
abilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

abilities.name: Shoot Pistol
abilities.description: Once per game, unless reloaded. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.
